substep.title: Final Integration V-Gate
substep.action: Invoke code-verify with: - gate = "final-integration" - (other inputs same as per-slice but without slice_id)

check.action: Apply the same loop-back routing as step 5b. final- integration findings often surface cross-slice integration issues that per-slice gates missed; these typically loop back to I-phase (re-dispatch worker on the affected slice with the cross-slice finding context). Rare cases loop back to P-phase (planning gap revealed).
Final integration passed. Determine merge path.

check.output:
Implementation complete. All slices verified. Final integration passed.
**Next**: invoke `local-merge` skill for the V-phase merge. Inputs: - branch = {{branch}} - target_branch = {{base_branch}} - worktree_path = {{worktree_path}}
local-merge handles squash + rebase + merge + worktree cleanup in one operation.
After local-merge returns successfully, transition the ticket to `verified` via transition-ticket-status.py.

substep.title: Emit Handoff
